mapper.select: select ui.student_id , ui.college , ui.user_info_id , ui.password , ui.major , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , re.role_name , ui.name , ui.phone_number , use.status_name , ui.registration_date , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 FROM user_info ui left join role_enum re on ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 = re.role_enum_id left join user_status_enum use on ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 = use.user_status_enum_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ui.student_id , ui.college , ui.user_info_id , ui.password , ui.major , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , re.role_name , ui.name , ui.phone_number , use.status_name , ui.registration_date , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 FROM user_info ui left join role_enum re on ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 = re.role_enum_id left join user_status_enum use on ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 = use.user_status_enum_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ui.student_id , ui.college , ui.user_info_id , ui.password , ui.major , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , re.role_name , ui.name , ui.phone_number , use.status_name , ui.registration_date , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 FROM user_info ui left join role_enum re on ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 = re.role_enum_id left join user_status_enum use on ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 = use.user_status_enum_id where ui.user_info_id = #{id}
